task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Pure Batch Cron (No Endpoints)** (Level 6)

ARCHETYPE: batch_job. Shape: backend-only, the ENTIRE app is one scheduled cron block — no HTTP endpoints, no pages, no auth. This is the purest form of batch_job. Schedule: every day at '03:00 AM': find and delete Sessions older than 7 days. ONE auxiliary endpoint GET /api/session-count so tests can verify rows exist (required for test runner) — but the CORE of this task is the cron block. DO NOT add endpoints for creating
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Sessions table:
  user_id, required
  token, required
  created_at_date, auto

every day at 3am:
  old_sessions = get every Session where created_at_date is older than 7 days
  for each old_session in old_sessions:
    delete old_session from Sessions

when user calls GET /api/session-count:
  session_count = count of id from Sessions
  send back { count: session_count }
